sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3236" key="a)kma/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκμάδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, kind of <sense id="n3236.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surgical instrument, Hermes</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:38:281" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.281</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.); <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conical crucible</tr_>, Ps.-Mos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:p.39B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.39B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
